releaseNotes: 完整修复中英文即时切换：Tab、菜单、状态、目录、商品、预览与错误提示无需重启即可统一刷新；同时修复 Codex 新建任务页闪烁、模板同步阻塞，并优化 WorkBuddy 深色视觉。
releaseNotesEn: Completely fixes instant Chinese/English switching across tabs, menus, status, catalog, products, previews, and errors without a relaunch. Also fixes Codex new-task flicker, nonblocking hourly theme sync, and WorkBuddy dark-mode visuals.
